claim: Accounts completing guided onboarding retain at a higher rate through day 30.
audience: Chief Customer Officer and customer success directors

checks.criterion: Claim matches the measured cohort and period
checks.evidence: Caption names paid-account cohorts and day 30.
Both groups use day-zero active paid accounts as the denominator.

checks.criterion: Observational evidence is not presented as causal
checks.evidence: The current subtitle uses 'drives' even though users self-selected onboarding completion.

checks.criterion: Series can be distinguished without color
checks.evidence: Both lines use solid strokes and require color discrimination.

revision_actions: Use direct labels and distinct line patterns
